purpose: S4 bridge admission manifest for reviewed no-egress dry-run and explicit opt-in semantic execution.

scope.allowed_action: trusted sentinel dry-run and explicit opt-in execution through the reviewed bridge executor
scope.forbidden_action: importing or executing generated suite.py artifacts outside the reviewed bridge executor

executor.workspace_policy: copy normalized suite.py, target module, reference_oracle.py, and reviewed conftest.py into a per-suite/per-target workspace
executor.result_policy: reference_oracle failure blocks; mutant failures are recorded as target outcomes, not infrastructure failures

review_notes: The preflight runner must use an available no-egress isolation primitive before any bridge can be considered ready.
The preflight runner must scrub secret-bearing environment variables and redirect HOME/TMPDIR into the dry-run workspace.
The generated suites and target inventory must remain identical across reference-oracle and mutant runs.
Semantic S4 execution requires the explicit --execute-reviewed-bridge flag even when this manifest is installed.
